rulings.Case Title: KARIM H. TAHIR VS. JIMMY BUDIHALIM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Contempt, For Release Of Money Deposited Into Court
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 20, 2014, line 1. DEFENDANT JIMMY BUDIHALIM's Motion For Contempt, For Release Of Money Deposited Into Court DENIED on the condition that Mr. and Mrs. Tahir sign an agreement in accordance with C.C.P. § 995.710(c), authorizing funds to be paid to Budihalim on termination of the appeal. = (501/JAR)
Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 20, 2014, line 2. PETITIONER RECON TRUST COMPANY's Motion To Deposit Surplus Funds GRANTED. No opposition filed.= (501/JAR)

rulings.Case Title: ANNETTE HORNSBY VS. NEW CENTURY MORTGAGE CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For New Trial On Summary Judgment And To Vacate Judgment Entered In Favor Of Defendant
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 20, 2014, line 4. PLAINTIFF ANNETTE HORNSBY's Motion For New Trial On Summary Judgment And To Vacate Judgment Entered In Favor Of Defendant DENIED. The motion is untimely. = (501/JAR)

rulings.Case Title: ANNETTE HORNSBY VS. NEW CENTURY MORTGAGE CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants' Demurrer To Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 20, 2014, line 4. Defendants' Demurrer To Second Amended Complaint SUSTAINED without leave to amend because summary judgment establishes title in Deutsche Bank, predecessor in interest to Li and Jiang. = (501/JAR)

rulings.Case Title: AMCO INSURANCE COMPANY, AN IOWA CORPORATION VS. MARC EINHORN AKA MARC J. EINHORN AKA JEFFREY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 20, 2014, line 5. CROSS DEFENDANT GINA SPONZILLI's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT DENIED. Effect of provision of lease limiting use to "use for residential purposes" not dispositive as a matter of law. Motion to strike punitive damages DENIED because there is claim for constructive eviction. = (501/JAR)

rulings.Case Title: AMCO INSURANCE COMPANY, AN IOWA CORPORATION VS. MARC EINHORN AKA MARC J. EINHORN AKA JEFFREY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 20, 2014, line 5. CROSS DEFENDANT GINA SPONZILLI's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT OVERRULED. Proper cause of action for constructive eviction stated. = (501/JAR)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH CHUNG VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 20, 2014, line 6. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., FEDERAL HOME LOAN MORTGAGE CORPORATION's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT CONTINUED to March 20, 2014. Moving party to provide courtesy copies of operative complaint to Department 501 by March 10, 2014 at 4 p.m. with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date.= (501/JAR)

rulings.Case Title: ART WALKER VS. PENNYMAC LOAN SERVICES, LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 20, 2014, line 7. DEFENDANTs PENNYMAC LOAN SERVICES, LLC, and PNMAC MORTGAGE OPPORTUNITY FUND INVESTORS, LLC's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED as to prayer and mention of Happy Ocean and Post Apple. Motion to strike punitive damages denied. Allegations of unfair business practice and manipulation of default procedures sufficient to raise issue of oppression, fraud, or malice. = (501/JAR)

rulings.Case Title: ART WALKER VS. PENNYMAC LOAN SERVICES, LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 20, 2014, line 7. DEFENDANTs PENNYMAC LOAN SERVICES, LLC, and PNMAC MORTGAGE OPPORTUNITY FUND INVESTORS, LLC DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend to attach a copy of the Deed of Trust as part of pleading. Demurrer to second cause of action is overruled. Plaintiff says he only seeks damages, not equitable relief and statements in prayer for equitable relief are inadvertent. The Court treats Plaintiff's statements as a request to amend and delete claims for equitable relief in prayer. Demurrer to third cause of action for false light overruled. Allegations of publicity adequate. Statute of limitations cannot be basis of demurrer because failure to comply with statute of limitations does not appear clearly as a matter of law. Demurrer is overruled as to the fourth cause of action for unfair competition. Allegations are sufficient. = (501/JAR)

rulings.Case Title: NORTH EAST MEDICAL SERVICES VS. LAW OFFICES OF ANSEL D. KINNEY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Hearing For Their Mtn For New Trial
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 20, 2014, line 8. DEFENDANTs ANSEL KINNEY and THOMAS LALANNE Motion For New Trial CONTINUED to February 25, 2014. This motion was continued so Defendants could submit courtesy copies of motion for new trial. Copies were not received so Court again continues matter to February 25, 2014. Courtesy copies of the motion for new trial must be delivered to Department 501 by 4 p.m. on February 21, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date.= (501/JAR)

rulings.Case Title: MARGARET NARROW et al VS. NICK C GRAY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 20, 2014, line 9. DEFENDANTs NICK GRAY and ROBERT GARRETT's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT DENIED as to verification and attorney's fees. It is granted with leave to amend as to the statutory damages claim to allow Plaintiff to allege facts in support of that claim, i.e., submit Attachment 12. Other grounds of motion to strike are denied. = (501/JAR)

rulings.Case Title: MARGARET NARROW et al VS. NICK C GRAY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 20, 2014, line 9. DEFENDANTs NICK GRAY and ROBERT GARRETT's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend to attach a copy of the written agreement entered into with Defendants. (C.C.P. § 1166(d)(1).) = (501/JAR)

rulings.Case Title: JULIA YUEH VS. NORMA MENDOZA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Norma Mendoza, Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 20, 2014, line 10.PLAINTIFF JULIA YUEH's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Norma Mendoza, Points And Authorities DENIED. Defendant provided amended discovery responses. The request for discovery sanctions is also denied. = (501/JAR)
